metadata.title: 主よ御許に近づかん
metadata.subtitle: Nearer, My God, to Thee — Meiji-era Japanese (摂津第一公会, 1874)
metadata.lyricist: Sarah Flower Adams (1805–1848) — Japanese translation in 摂津第一公会刊「讃美歌集」 (1874)
metadata.x_pd_basis: Original lyrics by Adams (d. 1848) and tune by Mason (d. 1872) are PD by > 150 years. Japanese translation first appeared in 摂津第一公会刊『讃美歌集』 (Settsu Daiichi Kōkai hymnal, 1874) — Meiji 7, > 150 years ago. The earliest Japanese Protestant hymnal predates any individual editor by name and is firmly in the public domain
metadata.x_translator: Editorial committee of 摂津第一公会『讃美歌集』 (1874)
